checklist.detail: All 9 required terms present. Provider ID cross-links to PROVIDER_IDS.md; SSML tag cross-links to DISCOVERY.md#ssml-editor; README updated with glossary pointer. However, the Dialect definition ('regional or social variety of a language...') does not match the plan's description ('Vokda's normalized request/response shape vs. a provider's native shape'), which describes an API normalization concept rather than a linguistic one.
checklist.label: Implements the approved plan
